assertions.description: navigator.userActivation is exposed; this is the introspection surface for both transient and sticky activation.
UserActivation exposes a hasBeenActive boolean — the sticky bit that is now preserved across same-origin renderer-initiated navigations.
UserActivation also exposes isActive (transient); the new behaviour only carries the sticky bit, not the transient bit.
Both hasBeenActive and isActive are booleans.
The Navigation API is the modern surface for renderer-initiated navigations that this change applies to.
On a fresh load with no user interaction, hasBeenActive is false. (After this change, that bit can be true on a navigated-to same-origin page that inherits activation.)
